title: galium richardianum subsp. pusillum
intro: Galium richardianum subsp. pusillum, also known as the dwarf bedstraw, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Galium richardianum subsp. pusillum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Galium richardianum subsp. pusillum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a variety of health issues.
